reasoning: Abdusattorov's rating as of 2025-04-13 is 2773. To reach a rating that is 1% higher, he must achieve a rating of 2800.73 (rounded to 2801). FIDE ratings are formally published on the 1st of each month and the Wikipedia page is updated accordingly. Thus, on April 20, 2025, his rating on Wikipedia will still reflect the April 1 rating of 2773, making the first date practically impossible (assigned 0.05 due to forecast limits). For the subsequent dates, reaching 2801 is historically difficult; only a handful of players have ever crossed 2800. While Abdusattorov is a rapidly improving young super-GM, gaining an additional 28 points from 2773 requires sustained dominant performances across multiple classical tournaments without significant losses. Uncertainty naturally increases over the 6-month horizon, leading to progressively higher probabilities as he has more chances to string together brilliant tournament performances.
